summary: Committed and pushed the DinoBrain OS v2.0.2 P0 hardening work to app repo main, then pushed tag v2.0.2 to trigger the release workflow. Ran data repo git_sync dry-run; all data changes are conditional/requires_review, so data repo was not committed or pushed.
decisions: App repo push authorized by user and completed on main.
Pushed v2.0.2 tag because release-windows workflow is tag-triggered for v* tags.
Did not commit or push dinobrain-data because git_sync dry-run classified all 87 data changes as conditional/requires_review.
next_steps: Wait for GitHub Actions release workflow for tag v2.0.2 to finish.
If data-vault persistence is desired, review and selectively commit dinobrain-data changes separately.
